# lucabertelli.consulting - agent summary

## Identity
- Name: Luca Bertelli
- Alternate name: LB Consulting (query alias: "lb.consulting")
- Role: Cloud Native consultant & engineer (Platform Engineering, Kubernetes, SecDevOps, CI/CD, training)
- Email: info@lucabertelli.consulting
- Primary locale site: English default at /en/; Italian at /it/

## Services (high level)
1. Assessment & analysis of delivery and operations practices
2. Cloud adoption and migration support
3. Toolchain selection & SecDevOps / CI/CD implementation
4. Custom training on cloud-native and SecDevOps topics
